§ 01Welcome

Dear {{sellerName}},

Welcome to the ESOP transaction process for {{companyName}}. Today is Day 1 of your 120-day journey. This email series will guide you through what to expect, what you need to do, and who is on your team.

Day 1
Transaction Clock Started
{{engagementDate}}
{{targetCloseDate}}
120
§ 02What Happens This Week

Over the next 5 business days, you'll receive a daily email from Forhemit covering everything you need to know:

D1Today — Welcome & overview. What to expect, your deal team, the 4-gate structure.
D2Tomorrow — Document request. The specific documents we need from you, organized by priority.
D3Day 3 — Calendar & scheduling. Links to schedule your kickoff call and recurring check-ins.
D4Day 4 — Team introduction. Meet your deal team: trustee, ERISA counsel, appraiser, lender.
D5Day 5 — First check-in. Quick call to answer questions and confirm priorities.
§ 03The 4-Gate Structure

Your transaction is organized into 4 gates, each with a specific milestone:

G1Gate 1 — Capital committed. Lender engagement confirmed, deposit processed, team assembled. Target: Day 30.
G2Gate 2 — Valuation confirmed. Independent appraisal completed, FMV determined, LOI terms finalized. Target: Day 60.
G3Gate 3 — Operations cleared. COOP V1.0 complete, lender underwriting approved, legal documents drafted. Target: Day 90.
G4Gate 4 — Closing. All documents executed, funds wired, ownership transferred. Target: Day 120.
Hard stops: Each gate has specific requirements that must be met before proceeding. If a gate is missed, Forhemit will work with you to address the issue. Gates are not skipped — they protect you and the transaction.
§ 04Your Forhemit Contact
{{stewardshipLeadName}}
{{stewardshipLeadEmail}}
{{stewardshipLeadPhone}}
{{ref}}

Please save this contact information. All transaction correspondence should reference {{ref}}.

§ 05What You Don't Need to Worry About

Forhemit handles the following so you can focus on running your business:

A.Professional team assembly. We identify, vet, and coordinate the trustee, ERISA counsel, appraiser, and lender.
B.Document preparation. We prepare the lender package, trustee package, and all transaction coordination documents.
C.Timeline management. We track all milestones, deadlines, and dependencies across the deal team.
D.Gate clearances. We manage the gate process and keep everyone aligned on what's needed and when.

Your job is to provide information when requested, make decisions when needed, and keep running {{companyName}}. We'll handle the rest.

—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Transition Stewardship
California Public Benefit Corporation
Stewardship Lead
